nasb.text: The enemy said, ‘I will pursue, I will overtake, I will divide the spoil; My desire shall be gratified against them; I will draw out my sword, my hand will destroy them.’

esv.text: The enemy said, ‘I will pursue, I will overtake, I will divide the spoil, my desire shall have its fill of them. I will draw my sword; my hand shall destroy them.’

cnv.text: 仇敵說：‘我要追趕，我要追上，我要均分擄物；我要在他們身上得到滿足；我要拔出刀來，親手趕絕他們。’

ccb.text: 敌人说，‘追啊，追上他们， 瓜分他们的财物，尽情地掳掠他们， 拔出刀来把他们斩尽杀绝。’
